response.global_analysis: The video is a promotional skit for Hololive English -Advent- featuring dialogue and on-screen text. No vocal music is present. I am transcribing the spoken English dialogue and translating it (English to English) while also including key on-screen text like character names, emergency alerts, and game rules. Timing is strictly aligned with the vocal bursts and visual appearance of text. I have split long sentences into smaller blocks to maintain readability and stay within character limits.

subtitles.original: You know, come to think of it,
subtitles.english: You know, come to think of it,

subtitles.original: it's been two years since we broke out of the cell, huh?
subtitles.english: it's been two years since we broke out of the cell, huh?

subtitles.original: Yeah, time goes by fast. / Yeah.
subtitles.english: Yeah, time goes by fast. / Yeah.

subtitles.original: We've been through a lot, right?
subtitles.english: We've been through a lot, right?

subtitles.original: Huh? What? Hey guys! What's that over there?
subtitles.english: Huh? What? Hey guys! What's that over there?

subtitles.original: EMERGENCY
subtitles.english: EMERGENCY

subtitles.original: Attention. Justice. Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame.
subtitles.english: Attention. Justice. Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame.

subtitles.original: Initiating final warning protocol.
subtitles.english: Initiating final warning protocol.

subtitles.original: Five escapees detected from the cell.
subtitles.english: Five escapees detected from the cell.

subtitles.original: Repeat. Five escapees detected from the cell.
subtitles.english: Repeat. Five escapees detected from the cell.

subtitles.original: Targets are as follows:
subtitles.english: Targets are as follows:

subtitles.original: The Demon of Sound: Nerissa Ravencroft
subtitles.english: The Demon of Sound: Nerissa Ravencroft

subtitles.original: The Jewel of Emotions: Koseki Bijou
subtitles.english: The Jewel of Emotions: Koseki Bijou

subtitles.english: The Fluffy One: Fuwawa Abyssguard

subtitles.original: The Fuzzy One: Mococo Abyssguard
subtitles.english: The Fuzzy One: Mococo Abyssguard

subtitles.original: The Archiver: Shiori Novella
subtitles.english: The Archiver: Shiori Novella

subtitles.original: All units, apprehend the Advent members immediately.
subtitles.english: All units, apprehend the Advent members immediately.

subtitles.original: Oh my god! Holy... We're in trouble!
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Holy... We're in trouble!

subtitles.original: It's the B-word! Run!
subtitles.english: It's the B-word! Run!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! They're catching us!
subtitles.english: Oh my god! They're catching us!

subtitles.original: Hey! Be careful!
subtitles.english: Hey! Be careful!

subtitles.original: Oh no! They're so close! What are we doing?!
subtitles.english: Oh no! They're so close! What are we doing?!

subtitles.original: Think, there's got to be a solution for this, right?
subtitles.english: Think, there's got to be a solution for this, right?

subtitles.original: Piggyback ride! Come on!
subtitles.english: Piggyback ride! Come on!

subtitles.original: Okay, maybe not that one.
subtitles.english: Okay, maybe not that one.

subtitles.original: There has to be something though, plan B...
subtitles.english: There has to be something though, plan B...

subtitles.original: Bwahaha! Struggling already?
subtitles.english: Bwahaha! Struggling already?

subtitles.original: What are you doing here?
subtitles.english: What are you doing here?

subtitles.original: Finally show your face, huh?
subtitles.english: Finally show your face, huh?

subtitles.original: Ask nicely enough, and maybe I'll save your skins.
subtitles.english: Ask nicely enough, and maybe I'll save your skins.

subtitles.original: I'll punch you for a "mlem". Come on, come on!
subtitles.english: I'll punch you for a "mlem". Come on, come on!

subtitles.original: Um, here, I have a solution.
subtitles.english: Um, here, I have a solution.

subtitles.original: Oh! Whoa! Don't race us so fast, Pokey!
subtitles.english: Oh! Whoa! Don't race us so fast, Pokey!

subtitles.original: Hmph! I don't hate that.
subtitles.english: Hmph! I don't hate that.

subtitles.original: If you manage to pass the little trial I've cooked up,
subtitles.english: If you manage to pass the little trial I've cooked up,

subtitles.original: I'll whisk you away to a whole other realm...
subtitles.english: I'll whisk you away to a whole other realm...

subtitles.original: One where your pesky pursuers can't reach you!
subtitles.english: One where your pesky pursuers can't reach you!

subtitles.original: I mean, I guess that's our only option, huh?
subtitles.english: I mean, I guess that's our only option, huh?

subtitles.original: I guess so. Oh well, guess we will do it.
subtitles.english: I guess so. Oh well, guess we will do it.

subtitles.original: Alright. I've prepared something special. Arise!
subtitles.english: Alright. I've prepared something special. Arise!

subtitles.english: Go-Kart Escape

subtitles.original: What if you don't have a license?
subtitles.english: What if you don't have a license?

subtitles.english: Why... What's with all the Biboo-themed stuff?

subtitles.original: Interesting choice. Why do I like that?
subtitles.english: Interesting choice. Why do I like that?

subtitles.original: Oh my god! Escape! Escaping! Okay!
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Escape! Escaping! Okay!

subtitles.original: Yes, that's right. Take it from here, ankle-biter.
subtitles.english: Yes, that's right. Take it from here, ankle-biter.

subtitles.original: Hey! Who are you talking to, huh?
subtitles.english: Hey! Who are you talking to, huh?

subtitles.original: Who you calling ankle-biter? Hey! Settle down.
subtitles.english: Who you calling ankle-biter? Hey! Settle down.

subtitles.original: Actually, all right team, game rules are incoming,
subtitles.english: Actually, all right team, game rules are incoming,

subtitles.original: so make sure you better listen, okay?
subtitles.english: so make sure you better listen, okay?

subtitles.original: Wait, what's that? Shiori, Shiori, can you...?
subtitles.english: Wait, what's that? Shiori, Shiori, can you...?

subtitles.original: Yeah! Oh, nice!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Oh, nice!

subtitles.original: Wait, Bijou, how do you know the game rules?
subtitles.english: Wait, Bijou, how do you know the game rules?

subtitles.original: It's the glasses. That's how she knows. Yeah!
subtitles.english: It's the glasses. That's how she knows. Yeah!

subtitles.original: Rule 1: Survive 2 laps with zombies on your tail!
subtitles.english: Rule 1: Survive 2 laps with zombies on your tail!

subtitles.original: Zombies? Zombies?! Where? Where?
subtitles.english: Zombies? Zombies?! Where? Where?

subtitles.original: Remember last year we beat up zombies?
subtitles.english: Remember last year we beat up zombies?

subtitles.original: Well, one of them went on a path to revenge...
subtitles.english: Well, one of them went on a path to revenge...

subtitles.original: and now it's gonna run after you.
subtitles.english: and now it's gonna run after you.

subtitles.original: Oh, okay. Run! Oh no!
subtitles.english: Oh, okay. Run! Oh no!

subtitles.english: Rule 2: Collect items for bonus points,

subtitles.original: but watch out for traps that deduct points!
subtitles.english: but watch out for traps that deduct points!

subtitles.original: Oh no! Points? What the... points?
subtitles.english: Oh no! Points? What the... points?

subtitles.original: Rule 3: Victory is ours if we all get
subtitles.english: Rule 3: Victory is ours if we all get

subtitles.english: 30 points?! Did you hear that?

subtitles.original: 30 points! Oh yeah, we can do that.
subtitles.english: 30 points! Oh yeah, we can do that.

subtitles.original: All right, I will explain the course items...
subtitles.english: All right, I will explain the course items...

subtitles.original: I must run. You must run? Yeah, she must run.

subtitles.english: I'm gonna live out my dreams while

subtitles.original: Okay! So listening! Uh... Oh, she's fast.
